name: @onderling/sdk
description: Batteries-included, LAYERED developer facade for @onderling. ONE import for the whole SDK. LOW layer: named re-exports of the kernel (@onderling/core) plus the default adapters (VaultMemory + Vault family from @onderling/vault, the transports from @onderling/transports, the pod pieces from @onderling/pod-client) — a dev wires adapters explicitly for maximal clarity + compatibility. HIGH layer: thin opinionated helpers built ON the low layer — createAgent({...}) (run-as-agent, Tier 3, injects the defaults) + connectSkill(agent, name, appFn) (Tier 1: map any plain app function to a skill). Purely additive; the kernel stays de-fatted (defaults live HERE, not in core).
